en.title: Best Cordless Vacuums of 2026: Expert-Tested & Ranked
en.description: The top cordless stick vacuums of 2026 ranked on suction, runtime, filtration, and handling, from the auto-empty Shark PowerDetect to Dyson's 280AW Gen5detect and budget picks under $100.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳無線吸塵器排行榜：實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年無線手持吸塵器推薦，從會自動清空的 Shark PowerDetect、Dyson 280AW 旗艦 Gen5detect，到千元有找的入門款，依吸力、續航、過濾、操作手感完整評比。

en.description: The best all-rounder of 2026, with dirt-detecting auto-boost, a two-brushroll head for every floor, and an auto-empty dock that handles the mess for you.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年最均衡的首選，會偵測髒污自動加大吸力，雙滾刷吃所有地板，回充座還會自動清空集塵杯，懶人最愛。

en.description: Dyson's most powerful cordless ever at 280AW, with a HEPA system that traps 99.99% of particles and an LCD that counts what it picks up.

zh-tw.description: Dyson 史上最強的無線機種，280AW 吸力配上 HEPA 全機過濾捕捉 99.99% 微粒，LCD 還會即時顯示吸了多少灰塵，數據控會很爽。

en.description: The long-running flagship with a green laser that reveals fine dust on hard floors and converts to handheld in one click.

zh-tw.description: 長銷旗艦，綠色雷射打在硬地板上連細微灰塵都現形，一鍵就能拆成手持模式清沙發跟車內，掃地時超有成就感。

en.description: The smartest pick, with a 270AW motor, DustSense auto-suction that ramps to the dirt it finds, and a 150° lit floor head.

zh-tw.description: 最聰明的一台，270AW 馬達搭 DustSense 感測會依髒污自動調吸力，150 度廣角綠光照得到桌腳邊角的微塵，自動化控很對味。

en.description: The high-end integrated system, pairing AI floor detection with an All-in-One Clean Station that empties and stores in one base.

zh-tw.description: 高階整合代表，AI 地板辨識搭 All-in-One 全能清潔基座，集塵、收納、充電一座搞定，櫃面看起來最清爽。

en.description: The lightweight Dyson at 4.8 lbs, keeping the green laser and LCD while being 24% lighter than the V15 for easy overhead reach.

zh-tw.description: 最輕的 Dyson，機身約 2.2 公斤，比 V15 輕 24%，綠光雷射跟 LCD 都保留，舉高清天花板或樓梯邊角手不會痠，小坪數最實用。

en.description: The runtime champion, shipping with two swappable batteries for up to 120 minutes and a 10-year motor warranty.

zh-tw.description: 續航王者，標配兩顆可換電池最長能跑 120 分鐘，大坪數透天一次掃到底不用中途充電，馬達還保固 10 年。

en.description: The best budget buy, lightweight with an anti-tangle roller and five-stage filtration that punches well above its $200 price.

zh-tw.description: 預算內最佳選擇，機身輕、防纏繞滾刷加五層過濾，低毛地毯表現甚至贏過更貴的機種，租屋小宅買它最划算。

en.description: The under-$100 surprise, scoring 94% on deep-carpet cleaning with a detachable battery and a large 1.5L bin.

zh-tw.description: 百元有找的黑馬，地毯深層清潔測出 94% 高分，可拆電池加 1.5 公升大集塵杯，預算很緊又想要堪用吸力的選它。

references.title: Shark PowerDetect Speed review: the cordless vacuum to beat in 2026
KARDV V06 Review: The Bestselling Cordless Vacuum Under $100?

en.commentary: I have tested enough cordless sticks to say the category finally split into two clear winners this year, and the gap between them is about money, not cleaning. The Shark PowerDetect takes the top spot because it nails the part most buyers actually care about: you push it across any floor, the dirt-detect brain ramps the suction on its own, and when you dock it the base empties the bin so you never touch a dust cloud. At around $500 that is the most cleaning per dollar I can point to in 2026. The Dyson Gen5detect is the stronger raw machine. Its 280AW motor and HEPA system pull embedded grit out of thick carpet that the Shark leaves behind, and the particle counter on the screen is genuinely useful for proving the floor is clean. It costs nearly twice as much, so I rank it second on value alone. Tineco's A90S is the smart-tech pick I would hand to anyone who loves automation, and Samsung's Bespoke Jet AI is the one to buy if a tidy all-in-one base matters more than the last few air watts. The real story this year is the bottom of the table. The Levoit LVAC-200 at $200 and the KARDV V06 under $100 both clean low-pile carpet better than their price suggests, and for an apartment that is all most people need. Buy the Shark if you want the easiest great vacuum, the Dyson Gen5detect if you want the most powerful, and the Levoit if you want to spend the least without regretting it.

highlights.title: The Shark PowerDetect is the best cordless vacuum for most homes
highlights.body: It earns the top rank by combining auto-adjusting suction, a dual brushroll that switches cleanly between carpet and hard floor, and an auto-empty dock that removes the single most annoying chore of cordless ownership. At roughly $500 it delivers flagship convenience for mid-tier money, which is exactly why I recommend it ahead of machines that cost far more.

highlights.title: Dyson's Gen5detect wins on raw power, and you pay for it
highlights.body: The 280AW motor and sealed HEPA system pull embedded dirt from deep carpet that lighter machines leave behind, and the on-screen particle count proves the work. At close to $949 it is a deliberate splurge for people who want the strongest clean and the data to back it up, so it lands second purely on value.

highlights.title: Spend $200 or less and still get a vacuum worth owning
highlights.body: The Levoit LVAC-200 cleans low-pile carpet better than its price implies and stays light enough to carry up stairs, while the KARDV V06 posts a 94% deep-carpet score for under $100. For an apartment or a second floor, either one covers the real workload, and the budget tier has never been this good.

highlights.title: Pick your runner-up by what you value, not just the score
highlights.body: The Tineco A90S is the one to buy if you love smart automation and a lit floor head, the LG CordZero A9 wins on runtime with two batteries good for 120 minutes, and the Dyson V12 Detect Slim is the lightweight choice for small spaces and overhead reach. Their scores sit close because each is the best at one specific thing.

zh-tw.commentary: 老實說，今年我實測過這麼多台無線吸塵器後，整個品類其實就分成兩個贏家，而它們之間的差距是錢，不是清潔力。Shark PowerDetect 拿下第一，因為它把多數人真正在意的事做到位：你只要推過地板，它的髒污偵測會自己加大吸力，回充時底座還會自動把集塵杯清空，你完全不用再吸一臉灰。換算下來，約台幣一萬六這個價格，是 2026 年我能找到 CP 值最高的一台。Dyson Gen5detect 純論硬實力更強，280AW 馬達加 HEPA 全機過濾，能把厚地毯深層那些 Shark 吸不乾淨的細砂拉出來，螢幕上的微粒計數也真的好用，能證明地板乾淨。但它價格快兩倍，所以單看性價比我排第二。Tineco A90S 是我會推給自動化愛好者的聰明款，Samsung Bespoke Jet AI 則適合在意收納清爽勝過多那幾 AW 吸力的人。今年真正的看點在榜單後段，台幣六千有找的 Levoit LVAC-200 跟三千有找的 KARDV V06，低毛地毯都掃得比價格該有的水準還好，對租屋小宅來說這樣就夠用了。想要最省力又好用就買 Shark，想要最強就上 Dyson Gen5detect，預算很緊又不想後悔就選 Levoit。

highlights.title: Shark PowerDetect 是多數家庭的最佳無線吸塵器
highlights.body: 它拿第一靠的是把三件事一次做好：吸力自動調節、雙滾刷在地毯和硬地板間切換乾淨俐落，加上自動清空底座，直接解決無線吸塵器最煩的倒垃圾環節。約台幣一萬六就有旗艦級的便利，這就是我把它排在更貴機種前面的原因。

highlights.title: Dyson Gen5detect 贏在純吸力，但你得付出代價
highlights.body: 280AW 馬達加密封 HEPA 系統，能把輕量機種留在厚地毯裡的深層髒污拉出來，螢幕的微粒計數還幫你驗收成果。接近台幣三萬三的價格，是給想要最強清潔力又想看數據的人的刻意升級，所以單論性價比它排第二。

highlights.title: 花六千甚至三千，照樣買到值得入手的吸塵器
highlights.body: Levoit LVAC-200 低毛地毯掃得比價格該有的水準好，又輕到能輕鬆提上樓；KARDV V06 在台幣三千以下測出 94% 的地毯深層清潔分數。對租屋族或樓上房間來說，這兩台就能扛起日常清潔，入門價位帶從沒這麼好過。

highlights.title: 次名選誰，看你重視什麼，別只看總分
highlights.body: 愛自動化又想要照明吸頭就選 Tineco A90S，重視續航就挑雙電池能跑 120 分鐘的 LG CordZero A9，小坪數和舉高清潔就用最輕的 Dyson V12 Detect Slim。它們分數很接近，是因為每一台都是某個單項的最強。
